page.subhead: A selection of full-stack and front-end builds delivered for clients. Each one is published and in use.

cta.eyebrow: Currently accepting new work · Replies within 24h
cta.supporting: Full ownership from database to deployment, and a 100% Job Success track record. Tell me the goal and I'll come back with a plan and a timeline.

projects.name: Tasktrox
projects.subtitle: Full-stack project-management SaaS
projects.description: A Next.js + Node platform for organizing tasks, projects, and teams. Built end to end: data model, REST APIs, dashboard UI, and deployment.

projects.name: Travara
projects.subtitle: Full-stack travel booking platform
projects.description: A Laravel + Next.js booking platform with search, a complete booking flow, payments, and an admin panel.

projects.name: StaffToday.AI
projects.subtitle: AI-powered recruitment platform
projects.description: A Node.js recruitment platform with OpenAI-driven matching and screening, built for real hiring workflows.

projects.name: Emerald Psychiatry
projects.subtitle: Healthcare website front-end
projects.description: A polished Next.js healthcare front-end built around trust and clarity, containerized with Docker for clean deploys.
